# Redox Concentration

**Summary**: The concentration of redox agents used to initiate the polymerization process.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1994-muhammad|Muhammad, 1994]] evaluated red-ox concentration as a primary driver for gelation kinetics.

## Scientific Context

- [[1994-muhammad|Muhammad, 1994]] Acts as the initiator for the polyacrylamide polymerization.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1994-muhammad|Muhammad, 1994]] Quantified in ppm.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Redox concentration, initial polymer concentration and polymer type have significant effects on the gelation time. ([[1994-muhammad|Muhammad, 1994, p. 126]])
